            -- The integral of ‖r⁻¹‖ * ‖r • f x‖ is finite
            exact h₈
          ))
          <;>
          simp [norm_smul, IsBoundedSMul.leAssumption]
          <;>
          calc
            ‖(r⁻¹ : R) • (r • f x)‖ = ‖(r⁻¹ : R)‖ * ‖r • f x‖ := by simp [norm_smul]
            _ ≤ ‖(r⁻¹ : R)‖ * ‖r • f x‖ := le_refl _
        -- Simplify (r⁻¹ : R) • (r • f) to f
        have h₈ : (r⁻¹ : R) • (r • f) = f := by
          funext x
          simp [smul_smul, hr]
          <;>
          (try simp_all) <;>
          (try aesop) <;>
          (try norm_num) <;>
          (try linarith) <;>
          (try assumption) <;>
          (try contradiction)
          <;>
          (try
            {
              simp_all [hr]
              <;>
              aesop
            })
        -- Substitute (r⁻¹ : R) • (r • f) with f
        rw [h₈] at h₇
        exact h₇
      exact h₅
  
  exact ⟨h₁, h₂⟩

(try
      norm_num)
    <;>
    (try
      linarith [Real.pi_pos])
    <;>
    (try
      aesop)

(try simp_all) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try linarith [Real.pi_pos])

have h₄ : IntervalIntegrable (fun _ : ℝ => (0 : E)) μ a b := h
        have h₅ : IntervalIntegrable f μ a b := by
          exfalso
          simp_all [hr]
          <;>
          (try norm_num) <;>
          (try linarith [Real.pi_pos]) <;>
          (try aesop)
        exact h₅
      · have h₃ : (r⁻¹ : R) • (r • f) = f := by
          ext x
          simp [smul_smul, hr]
          <;>
          (try norm_num) <;>
          (try linarith [Real.pi_pos]) <;>
          (try aesop)
        have h₄ : IntervalIntegrable (r⁻¹ • (r • f)) μ a b := h.smul r⁻¹
        rw [h₃] at h₄
        exact h₄
  exact h₁
  <;>
  (try norm_num) <;>
  (try linarith [Real.pi_pos]) <;>
  (try aesop)

have h₁ : IntervalIntegrable (r • f) μ a b := hf
    have h₂ : IntervalIntegrable f μ a b := by
      -- Use the fact that scalar multiplication by a bounded scalar preserves integrability
      refine' h₁.integrable_smul _
      -- Show that the scalar is bounded
      refine' IsBoundedSMul.bounded_smul _
      <;> simp_all [IsBoundedSMul]
      <;> try norm_num
      <;> try aesop
    exact h₂
